# Apache HTTPD (HTTPS) — root-context

App at /, Apache terminates TLS on https://localhost:9443/ and forwards over plain HTTP to the backend. SERVER_FORWARD_HEADERS_STRATEGY=NATIVE so Spring Boot honors X-Forwarded-Proto and Vaadin advertises wss:// for PUSH.

Proxy URL on `https://localhost:9443`: `/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
Listen 443

<VirtualHost *:443>
    ServerName localhost

    SSLEngine on
    SSLCertificateFile      /usr/local/apache2/conf/server.crt
    SSLCertificateKeyFile   /usr/local/apache2/conf/server.key

    # Tell the backend the original request was HTTPS so Spring Boot
    # (forward-headers-strategy=NATIVE) advertises wss:// for PUSH.
    RequestHeader set X-Forwarded-Proto "https"
    RequestHeader set X-Forwarded-Port  "9443"

    <Location />
        ProxyPass         http://vaadin:8080/ upgrade=websocket
        ProxyPassReverse  http://vaadin:8080/
    </Location>
</VirtualHost>
```
